_comment: Transfer with Fallback pattern. Wire node-transfer-XXX from your routing logic. The fallback path catches dial failures and gracefully creates a callback ticket.

instruction.text: say "Got it, let me connect you to our [department name] team. Please hold."

transfer_option._comment: Choose ONE: cold_transfer (drop and disconnect, fastest) | warm_transfer (detect human, allow whisper, 30s default) | agentic_warm_transfer (transfer agent has 2-way convo with destination)

edge._comment: Singular edge — fires only on the magic string 'Transfer failed'

instruction.text: say "I wasn't able to connect you right now — looks like our team is tied up. Let me create a ticket and someone will reach back out within 1 to 2 business days. Sound good?"

transition_condition.prompt: Caller agreed to a callback ticket
Caller declined a callback or wants to try again later
